info.title: microservices.sh In-App Notifications Module
info.description: Per-user in-app notification feed. All reads and writes are user-scoped. The realtime push transport (WebSocket / Durable Object) is the host app's concern; this module owns persistence and read/unread state.

get.summary: List the current user's notifications (requires notifications.read)

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Reconnect cursor: return only notifications created after this timestamp.

get.summary: Accurate unread count for the current user (requires notifications.read)

post.summary: Mark specific notification ids read for the current user (requires notifications.write)
Mark all of the current user's notifications read (requires notifications.write)
